subject: Fix prompt truncation in tool-calling loop — pins system prompt, re-scans for injection
description: Implement sliding-window truncation in standard_agent.py:790-793 that preserves system prompt at the beginning. Re-scan tool results through PromptInjectionDetector. Enforce per-iteration prompt budget. Add regression tests for prompt growth and truncation behavior.

subject: Standardize database session lifecycle — fix SQL backend leak, M5 long-lived session, dual schema
description: Establish codebase-wide invariant: every session via context manager. Refactor sql_backend.py to per-operation 'with get_session() as session:' pattern. Refactor M5 ExperimentOrchestrator to accept session factory instead of raw session. Remove create_all_tables() from init_database() startup path.

subject: Complete Alembic migration coverage for experimentation and self_improvement tables
description: Add 'import src.experimentation.models' and 'import src.self_improvement.storage.experiment_models' and 'import src.self_improvement.storage.models' to alembic/env.py. Generate new Alembic migration to create the 7 missing tables (experiments, variants, variant_assignments, experiment_results, custom_metrics, m5_experiments, m5_experiment_results).

subject: Complete LLM provider migration — delete shims, consolidate factory functions
description: Delete src/llm/ package (38-line pure shim). Deprecate src/agents/llm_providers.py. Update all consumers to import from src/agents/llm/ directly. Consolidate create_llm_provider() and create_llm_client() into single factory in src/agents/llm/factory.py. Add VllmLLM support to consolidated factory.

subject: Break agents<->compiler circular dependency — extract shared schemas
description: Extract AgentConfig and shared Pydantic schemas to a new src/schemas/ or src/contracts/ package. Update agents and compiler to import from the shared package. Inject AgentFactory (or creation callback) into executors via constructor rather than direct import.

subject: Fix circuit breaker metrics race — move rejected_calls increment inside lock
description: Move 'metrics.rejected_calls += 1' at circuit_breaker.py:365,389,413 inside the self.lock scope in _reserve_execution(). Race only affects monitoring counter accuracy, not state transitions.

subject: Unify exception hierarchies — create FrameworkException base, split domain exceptions
description: Create FrameworkException(Exception) in src/core/exceptions.py. Make BaseError and SafetyViolationException both inherit from FrameworkException. Split utils/exceptions.py (683 lines, 18 exception classes) into domain-specific modules: agents/exceptions.py, compiler/exceptions.py, tools/exceptions.py. Keep only BaseError, ErrorCode, sanitize_error_message in utils/exceptions.py. Remove ExecutionContext re-export.

subject: Add LRU eviction to TokenBucketManager — prevent unbounded memory growth
description: Add LRU eviction or TTL-based cleanup to TokenBucketManager.buckets dict (token_bucket.py:362-563). Each unique (entity_id, limit_type) pair creates entries that are never evicted. Consider weakref.WeakValueDictionary or periodic cleanup of idle buckets.

subject: Replace approval polling with event-based wait — prevent thread starvation
description: Replace time.sleep(poll_interval) polling loop in executor.py:505-528 with threading.Event.wait(timeout). The approval workflow should set the event when approval/rejection occurs. Current implementation blocks a ThreadPoolExecutor worker for up to 1 hour per pending approval.

subject: Implement or remove retry_agent error policy
description: The retry_agent error handling policy is declared in the schema but not implemented in sequential.py:317-325. Users who configure on_agent_failure: retry_agent get silent degradation. Either implement retry logic or raise NotImplementedError with clear error message.

subject: Add wall-clock timeout to parallel stage retry loop
description: The while True quality-gate retry loop in parallel.py:78 has no global timeout. If quality gates always fail with on_failure=retry_stage and high max_retries, the loop runs indefinitely. Add a maximum wall-clock timeout and log cumulative retry time.

subject: Fix SQL injection in strategy_learning.py — parameterize LIMIT clause
description: Replace f-string 'query += f" LIMIT {limit}"' at strategy_learning.py:188 with parameterized query 'query += " LIMIT ?"' and params.append(limit). Zero test coverage exists for this module — add regression test.

subject: Mask Redis URLs before logging — prevent credential exposure
description: Use existing _mask_database_url() utility from src/observability/database.py to mask Redis URLs before logging at state_store.py:263 and llm_security.py:560. Currently full Redis URL (potentially containing passwords) is logged.

subject: Pin production dependency versions — add upper bounds
description: All 16 production dependencies in pyproject.toml use >= minimum pins only. Add upper bounds or use ~=X.Y compatible release constraints. Prioritize security-critical packages: cryptography, pyyaml, jinja2, sqlalchemy, langchain.

subject: Create CLI test suite — primary user entry point has zero coverage
description: Create tests/test_cli/ with Click CliRunner tests covering: maf run, maf validate, maf list, maf rollback. Test invalid YAML, missing files, schema violations. Add PathSafetyValidator to --output path (security gap). Test YAML loading paths to prevent safe_load regression.

subject: Consolidate 5 duplicate test directories into canonical locations
description: Consolidate tests/safety/ into tests/test_safety/, tests/compiler/ into tests/test_compiler/, etc. Merge conftest fixtures. Order: compiler (low risk) → auth → tools → safety (medium) → self_improvement (highest risk due to nested subdirs). Verify no fixture name collisions.

subject: Add tests for untested core agent components
description: Create test files for: response_parser.py (malformed responses, injection in tool calls), agent_observer.py (event emissions, lifecycle), cost_estimator.py (pricing calculations, edge cases). These are core agent components with zero direct test coverage.

subject: Add spec= to high-risk mock instances — fix double-blind-spot with Any types
description: Add spec=RealClass to Mock/MagicMock calls. Prioritize: ConfigLoader (26+ mocks), AgentFactory (20+), ToolRegistry, ExecutionTracker (30+). Currently only 51 of 507 mocks use spec=. Combined with Optional[Any] interface types, creates a double-blind-spot where interface drift is invisible to both tests and type checkers.

subject: Replace 23 vacuous assert True statements with meaningful assertions
description: Replace assert True/assert False in 13 test files with real assertions. For component-existence tests, verify actual imports. For memory tests, measure actual memory usage. For error-handling tests, use pytest.raises(). For config injection tests, replace try/except assert True with pytest.raises(ExpectedType).
